## Checklist

- [ ] `gofmt` applied to changed Go files
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes locally
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes locally
- [ ] No new third-party `require` entries in `go.mod` (stdlib-only policy unless explicitly agreed)
- [ ] Public API changes are described in the PR body (or marked N/A)
